text:
Okay. Once upon a time in the magical forest of Evergreen there was a curious otter named Oliver who loved to explore. He would swim underneath rocks, climb trees, and hunt for shiny shells along the shore. But one day Oliver heard whispers—rumors of a mysterious treasure hidden deep within the forest.

Wanting adventure, Oliver decided to find out more. He followed tracks through the undergrowth until he stumbled upon a glimmering cave entrance. His whiskers twitched; tales say treasures come in unexpected shapes!

Creeping cautiously, Oliver discovered tiny pearls scattered like jewels around the walls. He gathered a dozen radiant pearls, his eyes lighting up with joy.

With his new prize, he scampered back home to display them. His friends gathered, admiring Oliver's discoveries. But little did they know, an old owl watched Oliver from his branch.

"So secretive you are," chuckled the wise owl. "One moonlit night we'll have your secrets."
